waiting_for: Short EMA bounce to EMA21 (~29818.30) – price must climb to that level before a valid entry can be placed.

long_assessment.reasoning: No bullish FVG below price, no breakout above the nearest psychological level (29800), and stochastic is neutral. There is no confluence for a long entry at this bar.

short_assessment.reasoning: Strong downtrend confirmed by EMA21 < EMA75 < EMA150. EMA21 (29818.30) sits ~62 points above current price and acts as dynamic resistance. A pull‑back up to EMA21 would provide a clean limit entry for a short. Confluence: (1) EMA alignment, (2) nearby psychological level 29800 just below EMA21, (3) stochastic is neutral, not opposing the short bias. Target is the 29800 round‑number level with a 5‑point buffer (29805). Stop is placed ~52 points above entry, giving R/R ≈ 1.33, meeting the minimum requirement. Confidence remains below the 0.65 threshold, so we wait for price to approach the EMA.
